'''dhavobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecotrophy|cecotrophy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-v-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecotrophy|cecotrophy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhavobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhævebeth|dhævebeth]] || [[word:dhævebej|dhævebej]] || [[word:dhævebesh|dhævebesh]] || [[word:dhævebe|dhævebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhavovoboth|dhavovoboth]] || [[word:dhavovoboj|dhavovoboj]] || [[word:dhavovobosh|dhavovobosh]] || [[word:dhavovobo|dhavovobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhavoboth|dhavoboth]] || [[word:dhavoboj|dhavoboj]] || [[word:dhavobosh|dhavobosh]] || [[word:dhavobo|dhavobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhavofboth|dhavofboth]] || [[word:dhavofboj|dhavofboj]] || [[word:dhavofbosh|dhavofbosh]] || [[word:dhavofbof|dhavofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhavobotho|dhavobotho]] || [[word:dhavobojo|dhavobojo]] || [[word:dhavobosho|dhavobosho]] || [[word:dhavoboko|dhavoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhavoboth|dhavoboth]] || [[word:dhavoboj|dhavoboj]] || [[word:dhavobosh|dhavobosh]] || [[word:dhavobo|dhavobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhavobothol|dhavobothol]] || [[word:dhavobojol|dhavobojol]] || [[word:dhavoboshol|dhavoboshol]] || [[word:dhavobokol|dhavobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhavobothotho|dhavobothotho]] || [[word:dhavobojojo|dhavobojojo]] || [[word:dhavoboshosho|dhavoboshosho]] || [[word:dhavoboko|dhavoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhavobothon|dhavobothon]] || [[word:dhavobojon|dhavobojon]] || [[word:dhavoboshon|dhavoboshon]] || [[word:dhavobokon|dhavobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhavobothoro|dhavobothoro]] || [[word:dhavobojoro|dhavobojoro]] || [[word:dhavoboshoro|dhavoboshoro]] || [[word:dhavobokoro|dhavobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
